docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRITT, HARRY G AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRITT, HARRY G RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $16,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $92.05 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,392.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA
